characters.name: Algonquin Casper Lumpus
characters.description: Scoutmaster Algonquin C. LumpusPhysical InformationSpeciesWestern MooseGenderMaleOriginShadow mosesAppearanceBrown fur, long antlers, tallPersonal InformationOccupationScoutmaster (formerly)Legumes MemberFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherUnnamed grandfatherSherman B. Lumpus(great-grandfather)Migrating Mulberry Tree(ex-wife)Antlered Young Migrating Mulberry Trees(children)Jane Doe(second wife)AffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanCabinScoutmaster's CabinCabin MatesSlinkman(Assistant)PositionScoutmasterProduction InformationDebutMonkey See, Camping Doo(Pilot)Voiced byTom KennyScoutmaster Algonquin C. Lumpusis the scoutmaster (was revealed to be fake) ofCamp Kidneyand the main antagonist ofCamp Lazlo. Unnamed motherUnnamed grandfatherSherman B. Lumpus(great-grandfather)Migrating Mulberry Tree(ex-wife)Antlered Young Migrating Mulberry Trees(children)Jane Doe(second wife) Scoutmaster Lumpus (Full name: Algonquin C. Lumpus) is an impostor, a stingy, grumpy, bossy, mean, angry, stubborn, short-tempered moose with a big ego. His head has the same design of Heffer Wolfe's head from the TV seriesRocko's Modern Life. His last name is always mispronounced by almost everyone except forRajandSlinkman.Everyone else refers to him as Scoutmaster "Lump-us" instead of pronouncing it as "Loompus". Everything has to be exactly how he likes and wants it to be or he becomes enraged. Scoutmaster Lumpus (Full name: Algonquin C. Lumpus) is an impostor, a stingy, grumpy, bossy, mean, angry, stubborn, short-tempered moose with a big ego. His head has the same design of Heffer Wolfe's head from the TV seriesRocko's Modern Life. His last name is always mispronounced by almost everyone except forRajandSlinkman.Everyone else refers to him as Scoutmaster "Lump-us" instead of pronouncing it as "Loompus". Everything has to be exactly how he likes and wants it to be or he becomes enraged. He is almost always in a bad mood and this horrible disposition could have been caused by his parents' failure to train him as a mime and tell him that they love him or even show any signs of care for him [citation needed]. One of the few things that does make Scoutmaster Lumpus happy is doing what he can to ruin the fun for the other scouts. This includes confiscating packages sent to the campers from home, because they're against camp rules. However, the very thought of eating canned tuna can turn his personality around. Nobody, however, knows Lumpus's secret: he loves playing with dolls and has a collection of them stashed in his closet as revealed in the episode,Hello Dolly. He is a member of a secretive club called the "Legume Council" and desires to be Grand Legume inSlap Happy. In the episodeThe Battle of Pimpleback Mountain, Lumpus had a ritual of visiting an old site near the camp where his great-grandfather,General Sherman Beauregard Lumpus, had fought in and won a war though after an attempt to scam his fellow troops. Slinkman revealed to Lazlo, Raj andClamof Jelly Cabin the "war" was actually

characters.name: Aliens
characters.description: AliensPhysical InformationSpeciesAlienOriginOuter SpaceAppearanceOne-eyed creatures with purple skin Aliensare three aliens who abductSamsonand demand cheese. After kicking Samson out of their flying saucer, they trick Samson by disguising themselves as "vague background characters" (Harold,Gordon, andWilbert) to help Samson get rid ofthe Canadian Trouts, who Samson thinks are the real aliens. This was due to both groups wanting cheese. Later, they go toAcorn Flats, and befriendNina. They have a strange fetish for fiddle music, dancing strangely and making weird noises when hearing it. The Aliens voiced byJeff Bennett,Tom Kenny, andMr. Lawrence.

characters.name: Almondine
characters.description: AlmondinePhysical InformationSpeciesHorned OwlGenderFemaleAffiliationCampAcorn FlatsScoutSquirrelCabin MatesAmberToodiePositionCabin memberProduction InformationDebutSnake EyesVoiced byJodi Benson Almondine Nestelleis a recurring character in the series. Almondine is a beige owl scout fromAcorn Flats. She has dark brown hair, wears glasses likeNina, and is a stereotypical "nerd" in appearance. She's the most commonly seen secondary Squirrel Scout. Almondine is a beige owl scout fromAcorn Flats. She has dark brown hair, wears glasses likeNina, and is a stereotypical "nerd" in appearance. She's the most commonly seen secondary Squirrel Scout. It is known that she loves mathematics, (sending away for a math-themed pinup on one occasion,) and also enjoys theater. Her favorite actor isRock Buckskin, and she feels that his latest flop, "Caribbean Caribou Two: Back in Action" really had no plot. She is the only Squirrel Scout who is a member of the Rock Buckskin Fan Club, which is led byJane Doe. She also helpsPatsy, Nina, andGretchenstealCamp Kidney's parade float. She is shown to feel incompatible with the concept of "pretty," preferring to describe herself as "practical."

characters.name: Amber
characters.description: AmberPhysical InformationSpeciesEuropean RabbitGenderFemaleAppearanceAzure Fur, Long Ears, ShortAffiliationCampAcorn FlatsScoutSquirrelCabin MatesAlmondineToodiePositionCabin MemberProduction InformationDebutSnake EyesVoiced byTara Strong Toodie Amber, also calledThe Light Pink Hare, is a character inCamp Lazloseries. She is a rabbit scout fromAcorn Flats. Amber is the most cheerful Squirrel Scout whose friends arePatsy,Nina,Gretchen,Almondine, andSuzie. InIt's No Picnic, she meetsCamp Kidney's scoutmaster and calls him "Loumpus", instead of "Lumpus". InSwimming Buddy, Amber sits betweenHoneyand Almondine and observates boys who went on swimming pool. InMarshmallow Jones, she roasts marshmallows with Patsy, Gretchen, Nina, and Almondine. In "Dosey Doe" Amber is seen with Honey and Suzie. She dances withSkip. InThe Nothing Club, whenRajimages himself as a DJ, Amber watches him closely. InSnake Eyes, she is seen between Almondine and Suzie. InMiss Fru Fru, she searches on encyclopedia what is "fru fru". InLove Sick, she drinks tea with Suzie. InI've Never Bean in a Sub, she works as the accountant from Squirrel Scout's cookie business. InSnow BeansandSquirrel Seats, Amber joins in singing on the bus trip. She watches a Mascot Competition with other Squirrel Scouts inMascot Madness. She jumps into rope with Almondine inBeany Weenies. InHard Days Samson, Amber chases with her friendsSamson. InSquirrel Scout Slinkman, Amber sits between Gretchen and Almondine. She also appears inTaking Care of GretchenandCall Me Almondine.

characters.name: Baby Chick
characters.description: Baby ChickPhysical InformationSpeciesChicken/HenGenderFemaleProduction InformationDebutLumpus vs. the VolcanoVoiced by(unknown)The Baby Chick is a minor character,she was seen on a commercial withDeputy Doodle-Doo singing the Chicken pot pie song,she jumps out of a pie singing: "Try our chicken pot pie!" then lands on the chicken pot pie box,Deputy Doodle-Doo is holding up while staring happily at audience. WhenClamknockLumpusout with a frying pan,she appear in Lumpus' dream,in which there were 3 of her flying next to Lumpus.

characters.name: Beastly Bumblepuss
characters.description: Beastly BumblepussAffiliationScoutBeanProduction InformationDebutCave ChatterVoiced byCarlos Alazraqui Beastly Bumblepussis a frozen bean scout thatSamsonchats with. His only appearance was in the episodeCave Chatter. Samson found this caveman frozen in a block of ice, and began talking to him as a friend, since the caveman couldn't tell Samson to be quiet. The Jelly Beans found him by accident, and when they saw the caveman wearing a Bean Scout cap, they wanted to thaw him and show him around camp. They called him a Cave Bean, the first Bean Scout, from which all Beans are evolved. After the caveman goes berserk and attacks the camp, especially seeking out Samson for driving him nuts with his incessant chatter, the Jelly Beans refreeze him. Once he's frozen again, Samson resumes talking to him; as the scene fades out, we see that it still drives the caveman insane, but he has no recourse.

characters.name: Big Bean
characters.description: Worldwide Bean Scout JamboreePhysical InformationSpeciesBeanGenderMaleOriginCamp KidneyAppearanceBean Shaped body, orange mustachePersonal InformationOccupationCamps' FounderFamilyClyde(cousin)Big Bean and Clyde's GrandfatherProduction InformationDebutHello Summer, Goodbye CampVoiced byTom Kenny Big Beanis the head of all Bean Scouts in the world. Although his name is Big Bean, he is actually a small bean (although he is actually bigger than the average bean). He appears to be a big bean when people look into the glass, which is actually a magnifying glass. He went toCamp Kidneywhen he was a scout and he previously owned Lazlo's old neckerchief until Lazlo gave it back. If it wasn't for this gesture, the Big Bean could have let Camp Kidney be demolished.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: BillPhysical InformationSpeciesAardvarkGenderMaleOriginEither Scotland or the Southern United StatesAppearanceLong tailPersonal InformationOccupationCamp Kidney CamperAffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanCabin MatesWilbertGordonPositionCamperProduction InformationDebutBeans Are from MarsVoiced byTom Kenny Billis a aardvark Bean Scout and a minor character inCamp Kidney. He is a light periwinkle aardvark scout who attends Camp Kidney. He is portrayed with a Scottish accent inParasitic Paland inBoxing Edward, and later instead a cracking, Southern accent inSwimming Buddy,Campers All Pull PantsandHot Spring Fever.

characters.name: Brother Bu-Bu
characters.description: Brother Bu-Bu is a legume member who make all the phone calls and is usually the person who receives the secret handshake. He is voiced byDoug Lawrencewho also voices Filburt fromJoe Murray's other series like Rocko's Modern Life before Camp Lazlo.

characters.name: Caught Fish
characters.description: Caught FishHumanised formFish formPhysical InformationSpeciesFishGenderMaleProduction InformationDebutGone Fishin' (Sort of)Voiced byTom KennyCaught Fishis an episodical character that appears in "Gone Fishin' (Sort of)". He is an orange male fish with salmon-colored lips and fins. He has big eyes and scales. Lumpuscatches him in theLeaky Lakeand then he has a fish sticks lunch withRajandClam, after whichLazloagreed to back him into water.

characters.name: Cheese Obsessed Canadian Trouts
characters.description: Cheese Obsessed Canadian TroutsPhysical InformationOriginCanadaProduction InformationDebutStrange Trout from Outer SpaceVoiced byCarlos AlazraquiJeff Bennett Jeff Bennett TheCheese Obsessed Canadian Troutsare a trio of fish who are obsessed with cheese. In the 4th and Semi-finale chapter of Cartoon Network Invaded, three new Canadian fish appear as new scouts.Samsontries to run them out of camp when he learns they want to steal cheese, which furthers his mistaken belief that the Canadian trouts are the aliens. After the trout achieve of their goal of stealing cheese, one of them states that this is the worst he's ever been treated in all of their career as professional cheese thieves. They're voiced byCarlos AlazraquiandJeff Bennett.

characters.name: Cheese Obsessed Canadian Trouts
characters.description: Cheese Obsessed Canadian TroutsPhysical InformationOriginCanadaProduction InformationDebutStrange Trout from Outer SpaceVoiced byCarlos AlazraquiJeff Bennett Jeff Bennett TheCheese Obsessed Canadian Troutsare a trio of fish who are obsessed with cheese. In the 4th and Semi-finale chapter of Cartoon Network Invaded, three new Canadian fish appear as new scouts.Samsontries to run them out of camp when he learns they want to steal cheese, which furthers his mistaken belief that the Canadian trouts are the aliens. After the trout achieve of their goal of stealing cheese, one of them states that this is the worst he's ever been treated in all of their career as professional cheese thieves. They're voiced byCarlos AlazraquiandJeff Bennett.

characters.name: Chip and Skip
characters.description: Chip and SkipPhysical InformationSpeciesDung beetleGenderMalesAppearanceBlue Violet, Tall, TwinsPersonal InformationOccupationCampersFamilyChip & Skip's parentsAffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanCabinPintoCabin MatesEdward PlatypusScoutmaster Lumpus(former)Slinkman(former)Samson(former, inShorts)PositionCabin MemberProduction InformationDebutGone Fishin' (Sort of)Voiced bySteve Little Scoutmaster Lumpus(former)Slinkman(former)Samson(former, inShorts) Chip and Skipare two clueless, dirt-loving dung beetle twins. They not only love dirt, but it's required that they stay dirty; if they get clean, they'll fall asleep for 100 years. As dumb as they may be, Skip is the only camper to wear a sash with several awards pinned to it; this is a device to help viewers differentiate between Skip and Chip. Also, Chip's voice is slightly lower than Skip's. They live in Pinto Cabin withEdwardand are usually the ones who help him carry out his schemes though they're not totally aware of what's really going on.

characters.name: Chip and Skip
characters.description: Chip and SkipPhysical InformationSpeciesDung beetleGenderMalesAppearanceBlue Violet, Tall, TwinsPersonal InformationOccupationCampersFamilyChip & Skip's parentsAffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanCabinPintoCabin MatesEdward PlatypusScoutmaster Lumpus(former)Slinkman(former)Samson(former, inShorts)PositionCabin MemberProduction InformationDebutGone Fishin' (Sort of)Voiced bySteve Little Scoutmaster Lumpus(former)Slinkman(former)Samson(former, inShorts) Chip and Skipare two clueless, dirt-loving dung beetle twins. They not only love dirt, but it's required that they stay dirty; if they get clean, they'll fall asleep for 100 years. As dumb as they may be, Skip is the only camper to wear a sash with several awards pinned to it; this is a device to help viewers differentiate between Skip and Chip. Also, Chip's voice is slightly lower than Skip's. They live in Pinto Cabin withEdwardand are usually the ones who help him carry out his schemes though they're not totally aware of what's really going on.

characters.name: Clam
characters.description: ClamHover your cursor on his picture for a previewPhysical InformationSpeciesPygmy Rhinoceros (Dicerorhinus sumatrensis)GenderMaleOriginSouth AfricaAppearanceYellow Skin, ShortPersonal InformationOccupationCamperFamilyClam's MomClam's PopAffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanCabinJellyCabin MatesLazloRajSlinkman(former)Scoutmaster Lumpus(former)PositionCabin MemberProduction InformationDebutGone Fishin' (Sort of)Voiced byCarlos AlazraquiDoug Lawrence(Being Edward; uncredited)Jeff Bennett(Burpless Bean; uncredited) Clamis one ofLazlo's best friends and the main tritagonist of the award-winning original series fromCartoon Network,Camp Lazlo. Clam is a short, anthropomorphic pygmy rhinoceros, though from the audience's perspective, he is green. He is typically seen wearing a Bean Scout uniform. Clam is the quiet kid atCamp Kidney, rarely speaking more than a few words in each sentence, and usually repeating the final words his friends say. He has a very deep raspy voice. He was very hostile towardsRajwhen they first met. However, he was very accepting ofLazloand his quirky lifestyle. He doesn't seem it, but Clam is actually a talented genius. He showed some of his talents in several episodes, being able to solve a 1,000-piece puzzle in less than ten seconds and being able to count thousands of beans in a short period of time (128512). He is artistically gifted as well; he can draw with his right foot using a marker, he can sculpt using his mucus, and he also is able to paint impressive portraits, such as Leonardo da Vinci's "Mona Lisa". He once painted in less than ten seconds. In the episodeProdigious Clamus, he showed his musical talent, playing Beethoven's Ninth Symphony with an empty soda bottle. InBurpless Bean, he sang in an opera voice tune. He can also construct useful devices out of random objects: he created a remote control plane toy out of a hair dryer, and he constructed a long "log car" he used to find Raj when he thought him lost in the forest. In the Camp Lazlo Game Boy Advance video game "Leaky Lake Games",Slinkmanasked Clam to make a toaster work, proving him able to fix this kind of stuff. Also in the game, he quickly converted feet to miles to calculate a lake's length from Camp Kidney's shore to an island (10560 feet = 2 miles). Although he could be famous by showing off his skills to the world, he prefers to stay in camp with his friends and cabin mates. Clam isn't really interested in fame; he's okay with his normal life. In some episodes, he showed his ability to run over water and on walls without falling. It was shown several times that he knows complicated words for his age, and knows some Spanish and some French. To have fun, he practices boulder tossing, usually breaking the boulders, and to spare the time waiting for his food to arrive in the Beef Lumberjacks restaurant, he likes to play with spoons and forks, constructing towers in just a second. Even though he is the smallest camper in Camp Kidney, he is probably the stronges

characters.name: Clowns
characters.description: Clowns The Clowns are the antagonists of the episodeClown Camp. They consist of Biscotti, Gelato, Cannoli, Pistachio, and Spelloni. They all have Italian accents.

characters.name: Clowns
characters.description: Clowns The Clowns are the antagonists of the episodeClown Camp. They consist of Biscotti, Gelato, Cannoli, Pistachio, and Spelloni. They all have Italian accents.

characters.name: Clyde
characters.description: ClydePhysical InformationSpeciesBeanGenderMalePersonal InformationFamilyBig Bean(cousin)Big Bean and Clyde's GrandfatherProduction InformationDebutHello Summer, Goodbye CampVoiced byTom Kenny ClydeisBig Bean's fifty-foot tall bean cousin who likes to scare campers. He comes from the bottom ofLeaky Lake. He apparently knows how to saveCamp Kidney. He toldLazlothat the only way to save his camp is to go into the woods and find the Rock of Hope. There, he would find the Worldwide Bean Scout Jamboree.

characters.name: Commander Hoo-Ha
characters.description: Commander Hoo-HaSeason 1Season 2Physical InformationSpeciesAmerican BisonGenderMaleAppearanceBulked Body, Brown FurPersonal InformationOccupationPrickley Pines scout commanderFamilyHoo-Haa's motherHoo-Haa's younger brotherProduction InformationDebutThe Weakest LinkVoiced byJeff Bennett Commander Hoo-Ha Smilesis a recurring character ofCamp Lazlo,and the father. He debuted on the episode ''The Weakest Link'' as the main antagonist.

characters.name: Conjoined Pigs
characters.description: Conjoined PigsPhysical InformationGenderMaleAffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanPositionCabin membersProduction InformationDebutValentine's DayVoiced byTom Kenny Conjoined Pigsare magical conjoined twins who appear in the episodeValentine's Day.

characters.name: Conjoined Pigs
characters.description: Conjoined PigsPhysical InformationGenderMaleAffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanPositionCabin membersProduction InformationDebutValentine's DayVoiced byTom Kenny Conjoined Pigsare magical conjoined twins who appear in the episodeValentine's Day.

characters.name: Cousin Stinkbug
characters.description: Cousin StinkbugProduction InformationVoiced byCarlos Alazraqui Chip and Skip's stinky cousin who, while visiting camp for unspecified reasons, was challenged to breakSamsonof his cleanliness obsession. As Stinkbug attacks, the scene fades. The next time we see Cousin Stinkbug, he's completely clean, heading off to Sunday School.

characters.name: Cousin Stinkbug
characters.description: Cousin StinkbugProduction InformationVoiced byCarlos Alazraqui Chip and Skip's stinky cousin who, while visiting camp for unspecified reasons, was challenged to breakSamsonof his cleanliness obsession. As Stinkbug attacks, the scene fades. The next time we see Cousin Stinkbug, he's completely clean, heading off to Sunday School.

characters.name: Dave and Ping Pong
characters.description: Dave and Ping PongVariant 1Variant 2Physical InformationSpeciesCommon LoonsGenderMalesAppearanceYellow feathers, long necksPersonal InformationOccupationCampersFamilyDave and Ping Pong's GrandmaAffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanCabinFavaCabin MatesSamsonPositionCabin MembersJournalistsProduction InformationDebutGone Fishin' (Sort of)Voiced byDoug Lawrence Journalists Dave and Ping Pongare identical twin common loon brothers (Similar toChip and Skip, the dung beetle twins), and bean scouts fromCamp Kidney. They areSamson's cabinmates in Fava Cabin. Dave and Ping Pong are a couple of the secondary characters in the series. Unlike any other Bean Scout, they can fly as shown inFriendward. The only way to tell the two apart is Ping Pong's longer neck. In general, they are intellectually mature and articulate, and tend to be bookish and cynical. Together, they run the camp newspaper,The Bean!, formerlyThe Weekly BeanuntilLazlohelped themrebrandit to increase circulation. Their catchphrases are "Sounds logical," when discussing something among themselves, or deriding something they find fault with as "highly illogical." They are fond of synchronized swimming, first alluded to inIt's No Picnicwhen Dave laments the loss of the Mud Puddle to the Squirrel Scouts. They are then shown to do so together inLiving La Vida Lumpus.

characters.name: Dave and Ping Pong

characters.name: Deputy Doodle-Doo
characters.description: Deputy Doodle-DooPhysical InformationGenderMalePersonal InformationOccupationMascotProduction InformationDebutLumpus vs. the VolcanoVoiced byCarlos Alazraqui The mascot of the chicken pot pies thatScoutmaster Lumpuswanted. But Lumpus didn't eat his first pie because he fed it toMt. Blackhead, so the Jelly Beans bought him another one, but were promoted to the commercial for buying a pie from the supermarket when he showed up for the 1,000th person to buy a chicken pot pie.

characters.name: Deputy Doodle-Doo
characters.description: Deputy Doodle-DooPhysical InformationGenderMalePersonal InformationOccupationMascotProduction InformationDebutLumpus vs. the VolcanoVoiced byCarlos Alazraqui The mascot of the chicken pot pies thatScoutmaster Lumpuswanted. Blackhead, so the Jelly Beans bought him another one, but were promoted to the commercial for buying a pie from the supermarket when he showed up for the 1,000th person to buy a chicken pot pie.

characters.name: Edward Platypus
characters.description: Edward PlatypusPhysical InformationSpeciesAlbino PlatypusGenderMaleOriginNew York, USAAppearanceBeige, Short, Duck-Billed, Beavered TailPersonal InformationAliasesMutated Beaver (by Lumpus)Beaver DuckElvinOccupationCamperFamilySusan(Mom)Unknown fatherEdward'sPlatypus Brothers(Cheesly, Alpine, Fancy Pants and Philip)Edward's GrandmaAffiliationCampKidneyScoutBeanCabinPintoCabin MatesChip and SkipScoutmaster Lumpus(former)Slinkman(former)PositionCabin LeaderProduction InformationDebutGone Fishin' (Sort of)Voiced byDoug LawrenceEdward Platypusis a Bean Scout at Camp Kidney, and the secondary antagonist ofCamp Lazlo. He is the youngest son of Susan Platypus. He was voiced by Doug Lawrence. Beaver DuckElvin Edward is a curmudgeon platypus who likes to laugh at other's misfortune. Edward had his personality inherited from his older brothers. Edward hatesLazlodue to his optimistic and energetic personality, which often clashes with his grounded (if not somewhat cynical) temperament, and is somewhat jealous of him because he knows how to have fun. He is also the only Bean Scout to have any sort of common sense and gets easily enraged by idiocy. Edward is a curmudgeon platypus who likes to laugh at other's misfortune. Edward had his personality inherited from his older brothers. Edward hatesLazlodue to his optimistic and energetic personality, which often clashes with his grounded (if not somewhat cynical) temperament, and is somewhat jealous of him because he knows how to have fun. He is also the only Bean Scout to have any sort of common sense and gets easily enraged by idiocy. Edward is known to play mean pranks. In "Campers All Pull Pants," he manages to pants everyone inCamp Kidney, includingthe Scoutmaster. Eventually, he realizes that it's not only funny to pants other campers, but to pull down his own pants as well. In "The Weakest Link," Edward tricks theJellybeansinto following a map into the wilderness and walking in circles. Edward often attempts to assert his masculinity and toughness. In "Tomato Paste," Edward tries to earn all the required merit badges to graduate to being aTomato Scout, a distinction that only the "toughest" Bean Scouts normally achieve. In "Movie Night," he is revealed to be the youngest Bean Scout, and is deemed too young to watch a film rated "BB" for "big boys" only. He attempts to watch the film just minutes before his birthday, and is terrified. However, upon viewing it again a few moments after aging, he loves it like the rest of the campers. It is possible that he has a complex due to always being the youngest, so he always wants to prove that he's tough. He is also shown to own a doll named Veronica in "Hello Dolly," which he desperately tries to hide from the other campers; after he is discovered cuddling it, he immediately denies owning it and suggests that he blow it up to prove that he doesn't own it; he ends up blowing up a decoy doll made from a pickle and a marshmallow, which fools all of the campers except

characters.name: Elebug
characters.description: ElebugPhysical InformationGenderFemaleProduction InformationDebutCreepy Crawly Campy Elebugis the bug in the episode "Creepy Crawly Campy". She isRaj'sbug friend and basically his remedy for his insectophobia. A larvae (that resembles a beetle with the head of an elephant) that Raj found after protecting Jelly Cabin from bugs inCreepy Crawly Campy. Elebug's head resembled Raj's head. At the end of the episode, Elebug came out of her cocoon. It was revealed that she had grown into a very large, monstrous insect (that resembles the extinct dragonfly Megauneura) during her time in her cocoon. Then, she and other monstrous insects like her carry some of the Bean Scouts. Her roar is the same as Godzilla's. Elebug isn't seen or mentioned again after this. In the end, she kidnapped Scoutmaster Lumpus away, and the ending credits revealed that she has also gave birth to several babies that kidnapped the rest of Camp Kidney, a parody on the American Godzilla (Zilla Junior) from the 1998 film remake.

characters.name: Fluffy
characters.description: FluffyPhysical InformationSpeciesBearGenderMaleProduction InformationDebutWhere's Lazlo?Voiced byFred Tatasciore Fluffyis a huge bear thatLazlobrought home when the leader of Jelly Bean Cabin took an adventure inWhere's Lazlo?in the woods withoutScoutmaster Lumpusnoticing. It started when Lazlo pulled a pinecone stuck up the bear's nose, then he followed Lazlo back to camp and started chasing all the Bean Scouts thanks to Lumpus. It is probably said that Fluffy had eaten Lazlo, but he is found alive atBeef Lumberjacks.

characters.name: Fluffy
characters.description: FluffyPhysical InformationSpeciesBearGenderMaleProduction InformationDebutWhere's Lazlo?Voiced byFred Tatasciore Fluffyis a huge bear thatLazlobrought home when the leader of Jelly Bean Cabin took an adventure inWhere's Lazlo?in the woods withoutScoutmaster Lumpusnoticing. It started when Lazlo pulled a pinecone stuck up the bear's nose, then he followed Lazlo back to camp and started chasing all the Bean Scouts thanks to Lumpus. It is probably said that Fluffy had eaten Lazlo, but he is found alive atBeef Lumberjacks.

characters.name: Fruit Bat
characters.description: Fruit BatPhysical InformationSpeciesMexican fruit batGenderMaleProduction InformationDebutWhere's Lazlo? Thefruit batappears inWhere's Lazlo?. He is seen driving a banana truck for a company called Fruita Quicka. He speaks with a Mexican accent.
